prompt: Create a romantic spring portrait photograph of a young woman with long auburn-brown hair sitting sideways on a thick, curved cherry blossom tree branch in a blooming orchard. She wears a flowing white ankle-length traditional dress with blue floral embroidery, patterned borders, and a matching draped scarf, with beige embroidered flats visible beneath the hem. Her face is softly anonymized with a natural skin-toned blur while the pose remains elegant and serene. She holds a bright bouquet of red flowers with green stems in her lap with both hands. Surround her with dense pink cherry blossoms on dark textured branches, using a shallow depth of field so the background becomes warm, dreamy bokeh with hints of green foliage and golden sunlight. Compose the image vertically but framed as a 4:3 portrait crop, subject centered slightly left, full seated figure visible, branch forming a natural diagonal cradle across the frame. Use realistic photography, soft natural light, gentle pastel colors, detailed fabric embroidery, crisp foreground blossoms, creamy blurred background, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
